title: ConstructionDailyLog
description: Master schema for daily construction site logs. This is the backbone of the Construction Site AI platform. All AI extraction, generation, and database modules produce and consume data conforming to this schema. Designed for residential construction with extensibility for commercial.

log_id.description: Unique identifier for this daily log entry. Generated by the system at creation time.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Increment when breaking changes are made.

log_date.description: The calendar date this log covers. Format YYYY-MM-DD. Not the creation timestamp.

log_created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this log was first created in the system.

log_updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this log.

log_source.description: How this log was originally created.

audio_file_id.description: Reference UUID to the source audio file in the audio_files table. Null if not created from voice.

raw_transcript.description: The verbatim transcript text produced by Faster Whisper from the audio file. Stored for audit and re-processing. Null if not created from voice.

transcript_confidence.description: Average confidence score from Faster Whisper transcription. 1.0 = perfect confidence.

review_status.description: Current approval status of this log. Only approved logs feed downstream reporting.

review_notes.description: Notes added by the reviewer when approving or rejecting the log.

project.description: Identifies which project and site this log belongs to.

project_id.description: Foreign key to the projects table.

project_name.description: Human-readable project name. e.g., 'Johnson Residence - 123 Oak Street'

site_id.description: Foreign key to the sites table. A project may have multiple sites.

site_address.description: Full street address of the construction site.

contractor_company.description: Name of the general contractor company.

foreman_id.description: Foreign key to the workers table for the foreman who recorded this log.

foreman_name.description: Name of the foreman who recorded this log.

project_size_sqft.description: Total planned square footage of the project.

contract_value_usd.description: Total contract value. Used by cost tracking module.

permit_number.description: Building permit number issued by AHJ.

current_stage.description: The primary active construction stage on this log date. Used for sequencing validation and report generation.

active_stages.description: All stages with active work today. Multiple stages often run simultaneously (e.g., electrical and plumbing rough-in).

stage_completion_percent.description: Estimated completion percentage of the current primary stage as of end of this log day.

overall_project_completion_percent.description: Foreman's estimate of total project completion. Used for customer progress updates.

weather.description: Weather conditions recorded on site. Impacts work planning, safety, and delay documentation.

temperature_high_celsius.description: High temperature of the day in Celsius.

temperature_low_celsius.description: Low temperature of the day in Celsius.

wind_speed_kmh.description: Wind speed in km/h. OSHA requires stopping elevated work above approximately 40 km/h (25 mph).

work_stopped_due_to_weather.description: True if weather caused a complete work stoppage at any point today.

weather_impact_level.description: Overall impact of weather on productivity today.

weather_notes.description: Free-form notes about weather conditions and their specific impact.

workforce.description: All people on site today. Critical for daily cost estimation and productivity tracking.

total_workers_present.description: Total headcount of all workers on site today.

total_workers_scheduled.description: How many workers were expected to be on site today.

total_man_hours_worked.description: Total labor hours across all workers today. Used for productivity and cost calculations.

trades_on_site.description: Breakdown of workers by trade. Each entry is one trade group.

subcontractor_company.description: If these workers are from a subcontractor company.

late_arrivals.description: Workers who arrived late today. Used for attendance tracking and pattern analysis.

worker_identifier.description: Worker name or ID as extracted from voice note.

absences.description: Workers who did not show up. Affects productivity and scheduling.

visitors.description: Non-workers who visited the site today (clients, inspectors, architects, engineers).

workforce_notes.description: Free-form notes about workforce conditions, morale, productivity issues.

work_completed.description: Specific tasks and work items completed today. This is the core productivity record.

task_description.description: Clear description of what was accomplished. e.g., 'Framed all exterior walls on second floor north and east sides'

location_on_site.description: Where on the building this work occurred. e.g., 'Second floor', 'Master bathroom', 'Garage'

quantity_completed.description: Numeric quantity if measurable. e.g., 400 for square feet of framing.

task_completion_percent.description: If this is part of a larger multi-day task, what percentage is now complete.

linked_schedule_task_id.description: Reference to the project schedule task ID. Used by scheduling module (future sprint).

work_in_progress.description: Work that is underway but not complete. Carryover tasks from today to tomorrow.

blocking_issues.description: What, if anything, is preventing completion.

materials.description: Material tracking for the day. Core data for inventory prediction and procurement reminders.

material_id.description: Reference to the materials master table (future sprint).

material_name.description: Standard material name as it would appear in procurement. e.g., 'Ready-mix concrete 4000 PSI'

waste_quantity.description: Estimated waste quantity in same units. Used for waste analysis.

unit_cost_usd.description: Cost per unit. Used by cost tracking module.

delivered_today.description: Materials that arrived on site today via delivery.

delivery_condition.description: Condition on arrival. Damaged deliveries must be documented for claims.

required_for_tomorrow.description: Materials that need to be available tomorrow. This data feeds the Material Reminder AI service.

urgency.description: critical = work stops tomorrow without this material

shortage_flags.description: Materials that are running low or unavailable. Used by Material Reminder and Inventory Prediction modules.

equipment.description: Equipment and machinery used on site today.

equipment_name.description: e.g., 'Caterpillar 320 Excavator', 'JLG 40ft Boom Lift', 'Concrete Pump Truck'

is_rented.description: True if rented, false if owned. Rental cost tracking.

operator.description: Name or ID of the certified operator.

safety.description: Safety observations, meetings, incidents, and hazards. This data feeds the Safety Toolbox Talk AI service.

safety_meeting_conducted.description: Was a toolbox talk or safety meeting held today?

ppe_required_today.description: PPE required for today's specific tasks.

incidents.description: Any injuries, accidents, near-misses, or property damage. Empty array means zero incidents.

osha_recordable.description: True if this meets OSHA 300 log recordability criteria.

incident_reported_to.description: Who this was reported to. e.g., 'Site supervisor, insurance carrier'

hazards_identified.description: Safety hazards observed on site today. Used by Safety Toolbox Talk generator.

safety_notes.description: General safety observations not captured in structured fields.

delays.description: Any delays that impacted work today. Used for schedule variance analysis and delay pattern recognition.

hours_lost.description: Estimated production hours lost due to this delay.

days_lost_to_schedule.description: If this delay pushes the project end date, by how many days.

resolution_action.description: What was done or will be done to resolve this delay.

responsible_party.description: Who is responsible for this delay. Important for contract claims.

inspections.description: Formal inspections that occurred or were scheduled today.

corrections_required.description: List of items the inspector flagged for correction on a failed or conditional inspection.

code_reference.description: Specific code section cited. e.g., 'IRC R403.1.4'

tomorrow_plan.description: Foreman's plan for the next working day. Used by Material Reminder and Customer Update generators.

planned_tasks.description: Work planned for tomorrow. Must be realistic given current stage and dependencies.

prerequisites.description: What must be true or complete before this task can begin.

workers_expected.description: Total workers expected on site tomorrow.

materials_to_order.description: Materials that need to be ordered or confirmed for delivery tomorrow.

order_by_time.description: e.g., 'By 7 AM' or 'Order today for tomorrow delivery'

plan_notes.description: Free-form notes about tomorrow's plan, concerns, or contingencies.

client_communication.description: Any communication with the client today. Used by the Customer Update generator.

client_concerns.description: Concerns or questions raised by the client.

change_orders.description: Any change orders discussed or processed today.

attachments.description: Photos, videos, and documents attached to this log. Used by Defect Detection module (future sprint).

description.description: What is shown in this photo/document.

location_on_site.description: Where on the building this was taken.

file_path.description: Storage path or URL. Populated after file upload.

linked_defect_id.description: Links to defect tracker when Defect Detection module is active (future sprint).

ai_analysis_result.description: Output from computer vision analysis (future sprint).

financials.description: Daily financial tracking. Primarily populated by the cost tracking module (future sprint). Foreman may provide estimates.

ai_generated_outputs.description: Outputs generated by the five AI services (Sprint 5). Populated after AI processing completes. Empty on log creation.

structured_daily_report.description: Formatted daily report generated from this log.

customer_progress_update.description: Professional email to the client generated from this log.

safety_toolbox_talk.description: Safety toolbox talk generated based on tomorrow's planned work and today's hazards.

material_reminder.description: Procurement reminder generated from material shortages and tomorrow's requirements.

audit.description: Who created, reviewed, and approved this log. Required for compliance and dispute resolution.

schema_version_at_creation.description: The schema version when this log was created. Important for migration.

log_version_number.description: Incremented each time this log is updated. Enables optimistic locking.

previous_log_version_id.description: UUID of the previous version of this log record. Enables history traversal.

foreman_notes.description: Free-form notes from the foreman that do not fit any other structured field. The AI extraction engine dumps unclassified voice content here.

examples.raw_transcript: Today we completed framing for the second floor. Eight workers were on site. Two electricians arrived late. We used 40 cement bags and 120 steel rods. Rain delayed plastering. Tomorrow we begin plumbing.

weather.weather_notes: Heavy rain in the morning halted exterior framing from 7 AM to 10 AM. Work resumed after rain cleared.

work_completed.task_description: Completed framing for second floor including all interior and exterior walls

delays.description: Heavy rain stopped exterior framing work in the morning

planned_tasks.task_description: Begin plumbing rough-in on first floor
